channel.title: Docs on hiddenbyte.log

item.title: CV - Mehul Irá
item.description: Curriculum Vitae Personal information Full name: Mehul Sasikante Irá E-mail: mehulira@protonmail.com Work Experience Mindera Software Engineer. Since August 2015. Currently here. While working here, I’ve contributed with new features and fixes to several projects, that belongs to a Mindera client and/or tech partner, particularly in the Retail, Gambling, Gaming and SaaS business sectors. Technologies: Go, Java, Kotlin, Vert.x, Spring Framework, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL and MySQL. Portugal Telecom (now Altice Portugal) Software Engineer.
